positive: A stylized, minimalist woodland creature illustration featuring a fox and a squirrel intertwined in a stylized embrace. The style is neo-traditional tattoo art mixed with watercolor washes, emphasizing clean, crisp black line work contrasted against muted, earthy tones (sage green, burnt orange, ivory, deep navy). The composition should be perfectly centered and circular, designed to look excellent on a T-shirt or tote bag. The background elements (leaves, gentle mist, subtle stars) should be simple and abstract to maintain high contrast and legibility. Overhead soft studio lighting, vector-graphic cleanliness, highly detailed linework, high contrast, perfect for fabric printing.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, disfigured, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, too realistic, messy, complicated background, low detail
